The City of Homestead has lifted the boil water notice for Public Service customers west of Southwest 187 Avenue and anyone who lost water service. Flush taps for 5 minutes, discard the first batch of ice, and wash pet bowls with soap and water. Dishwashers and washing machines are safe to use. Thank you.
